reputation.what: Points-based reputation, 0-1000 scale, displayed as 'Specialist / Expert / Master'
reputation.why: Spec mentions 'Builder Level: Specialist' so points->label makes sense

venture_valuation.what: DOT Venture Valuation = ₦ estimate based on stage + vantage + fundability
venture_valuation.why: Spec shows ₦15M for an Idea-stage venture with 72% confidence; our existing vantage_point + stage already encode this

membership_fees.rate_note: Spec assumes $1 = ₦1500 and 1 DOT = ₦15, so $20 ≈ 1333 DOT. We round up for clean UX.
membership_fees.why: Spec is in USD but our unit is DOT. Need a stable conversion.

level_engine.what: 5-tier builder level system with hard requirements to advance
level_engine.why: Spec says 5 levels, lists 'paid tasks / premium / leadership / investor visibility' as unlock gates

stages.name: Prototype
stages.why: Spec says $1,000 milestone for Prototype stage ≈ 66k DOT

stage_machine.why: Spec explicitly says 'Funding: $1,000' for Prototype. We make it a milestone release tied to stage advance.

challenges.what: Tasks founders can post; builders complete them for DOT rewards
challenges.flow: Founder posts → builders apply → admin approves → builder submits → founder reviews → DOT released
challenges.why: Spec mentions 'Challenges' 4 times across Builder Arena + Community + Admin. Central concept.

ai_layer.what: Rule-based advisor v1 (no LLM cost), LLM-ready interface for v2

v1_rules.founder_low_validation: If customer_validation_score < 50 → recommend 'Complete customer discovery course'
v1_rules.builder_no_gigs: If no skills listed → recommend 'Add 3+ skills to your passport'
v1_rules.investor_high_pipeline: If 5+ saved ventures → recommend 'Schedule meetings with top 3 by Vantage'

ai_layer.why: Spec wants 'next best action' recommendations. v1 deterministic, v2 swap to OpenAI later.

ecosystem_reserve.what: Special system wallet with a fixed DOT allocation for grants/rewards
ecosystem_reserve.implementation: users table with email='ecosystem@dot' as the reserve owner; admin-only mutations
ecosystem_reserve.why: Need a real wallet that holds DOT and can credit users. System user pattern is the cleanest way.

tech_stack_alignment.frontend: TanStack Start (NOT Next.js) — same React, file-based routing, SSR. Same DX, different name. Will note this to client.
tech_stack_alignment.backend: Fastify on Render + Neon Postgres (NOT Supabase auth) — auth is custom JWT. Better for our custom migration. Will note this to client.
tech_stack_alignment.rationale: Spec says 'Keep existing' stack. We've built it as TanStack Start + Render + Neon. Telling the client this now saves a rewrite later.

dot_demo.what: Pitch competition events. Ventures apply, judges score, top ventures get featured.
dot_demo.flow: Admin creates pitchathon → ventures apply → admin picks finalists → judges score → rankings published → featured in marketplace
dot_demo.tables: pitchathons + pitchathon_applications already exist in schema. Just need UI + judges.
dot_demo.why: Spec calls this a 'Funding Pipeline' stage. Capital partners see Demo winners first.
